title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work at our company?
A: Employees may be eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements based on their role, performance, and departmental needs. To apply, please submit a request to your direct supervisor outlining your reasons and proposed schedule at least two weeks in advance. Supervisors will review requests and provide feedback within one week. Expectations for remote and hybrid work include maintaining regular communication with your team, attending all scheduled meetings, and meeting project deadlines. Employees must also ensure they have a suitable work environment that allows for productivity and confidentiality. Regular check-ins will be scheduled to assess performance and address any concerns. For further questions, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
